name: Himeko
desc: The one who repaired the Astral Express.\nTo witness the vast starry sky, she decided to travel with the Astral Express.\nHer hobby is brewing hand-made coffee.

1.name: Childhood
1.desc: After "Victory Rush" is triggered, Himeko's SPD increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

2.name: Convergence
2.desc: Deals <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to enemies whose HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or less.

3.name: Poised
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Dedication
4.desc: When Himeko's Skill inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, she gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> extra point(s) of Charge.

5.name: Aspiration
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Trailblaze!
6.desc: Ultimate deals 2 extra instances of Fire DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG to one random enemy.

100301.name: Sawblade Tuning
100301.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko's ATK to one enemy.
100301.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

100302.name: Molten Detonation
100302.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko's ATK to one designated enemy and Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.
100302.simple_desc: Deals Fire DMG to one enemy and minor Fire DMG to enemies adjacent to it.

100303.name: Heavenly Flare
100303.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko's ATK to all enemies. Himeko regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> extra Energy for each enemy defeated.
100303.simple_desc: Deals Fire DMG to all enemies and regenerates Energy if enemies are defeated.

100304.name: Victory Rush
100304.desc: When an enemy target is inflicted with Weakness Break, Himeko gains 1 point of Charge (max <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> points).\nIf Himeko is fully Charged when an ally target performs an attack, Himeko immediately performs 1 <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> and deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK to all enemies, consuming all Charge points.\nAt the start of the battle, Himeko gains 1 point of Charge.
100304.simple_desc: At the start of battle or when an enemy's Weakness is Broken, gains Charge.\nAfter any ally target performs an attack, if fully Charged, <color=#f29e38ff>launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> and deals Fire DMG to <color=#f29e38ff>all enemies</color>, consuming all Charge points.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

100306.name: Attack
100306.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

100307.name: Incomplete Combustion
100307.desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> second(s). After entering battle with enemies in the Special Dimension, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to increase Fire DMG taken by enemies by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
100307.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension. After entering combat with enemies in the dimension, there is a high chance to <color=#f29e38ff>increase Fire DMG taken by enemies</color>.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: After using an attack, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict Burn on enemies, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhen afflicted with Burn, enemies take Fire DoT equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Himeko's ATK at the start of each turn.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: Skill deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to enemies currently afflicted with Burn.
When current HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or higher, CRIT Rate increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.
